creator: dieter.ccu@gmail.com
text:
Build of  jdk-1.4.2p8_4 fails on amd64 with the following messages
cc -c -o /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/tmp/sun/sun.security.tools/jarsigner/obj_g/jarsigner.o -DDEBUG -Dic
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c: In function `TranslateDashJArgs':
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c:867: warning: comparison between signed and unsigned
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c:887: warning: comparison between signed and unsigned
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c: In function `AddApplicationOptions':
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c:945: warning: comparison between signed and unsigned
./../../../src/share/bin/java.c:950: warning: comparison between signed and unsigned
cc -c -o /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/tmp/sun/sun.security.tools/jarsigner/obj_g/jarsigner_md.o -DDEBUG c
./../../../src/solaris/bin/java_md.c:34:1: warning: "ARCH" redefined
<command line>:6:1: warning: this is the location of the previous definition
Rebuilding /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/bin/jarsigner_g because of /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/bug
cc -o /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/bin/jarsigner_g   -L/usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586d
/bin/mkdir -p  /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/bin /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/classes
/usr/bin/touch /usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/control/build/bsd-i586/tmp/sun/sun.security.tools/jarsigner/obj_g/.program.dirs.i586
gmake[5]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/j2se/make/sun/security/jarsigner'
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/jdk14/work/j2se/make/sun/security/jarsigner'
<<<Finished Recursively making jarsigner all @ Fri Jul 20 13:54:31 CST 2007.

How-To-Repeat: make on an amd64 box
dependent ports  are up-to-date
